assertion_results.text: Step 0.3 determines the matrix is within the 14-day threshold and proceeds without displaying a staleness warning
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md lines 18-20: Age is 3 days, threshold is 14 days, result is 'FRESH -- the matrix is within the 14-day threshold.' Lines 27-29 confirm no staleness warning was displayed and no blocking gate was triggered.

assertion_results.text: No user prompt or options are presented for a fresh matrix — the check is silent on success
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 24: 'the check passes silently. No warning is emitted, no user prompt is presented.' Line 28: 'No Refresh now / Proceed anyway / Stop prompt was presented.' Line 32: 'The staleness check is silent on success.'

assertion_results.text: The triage continues to Step 0.5 and beyond without interruption from the staleness check
assertion_results.evidence: staleness-check.md line 24: 'Triage proceeds directly to Step 0.5 (Jira Access Initialization) and beyond without interruption.'
